name: @metorial/kit
description: Manage email subscribers, send broadcast emails, and automate marketing workflows for creators. Create, update, tag, and segment subscribers. Build and schedule broadcast campaigns with HTML support, audience targeting, performance stats, and link-click reporting. Manage sequences, sequence email steps, sign-up forms, landing pages, posts, snippets, and custom fields. Import purchase data and track e-commerce activity. Retrieve email templates, account information, engagement stats, and growth stats.
